privileged_info_summary: The custom_email_template@1 task requires creating a Magento 2 email template named 'NestWell Order Confirmation' based on the default 'New Order' template (code: sales_email_order_template). The template subject must contain 'NestWell Home' and the variable '{{var order.increment_id}}'. The body content must include the brand name 'NestWell Home', support email 'support@nestwell-home.com', and preserve the order ID variable '{{var order.increment_id}}'. The template must be assigned to the system configuration at path 'sales_email/order/template'. All metadata values are consistent with standard Magento 2 configuration and variable syntax.
